DP.563.0011:
You have an offer to see
[0103,0000]’s Trainer Case.\f
Would you like to show your
Trainer Case?
DP.563.0012:
This is the Trainer Case of
[0103,0000], who lives in\f
[0125,0004],
[0124,0003].
DP.563.0013:
This is the Trainer Case of
[0103,0000], who lives in\r
[0124,0003].
DP.563.0014:
This is the Trainer Case of
[0103,0000], who lives in\r
[0125,0004].
DP.563.0016: Awaiting the other player to finish.
DP.563.0018:
[0103,0000] has invited you to
draw something.\f
Would you like to join the other
player and draw?
DP.563.0021:
[0103,0000] challenges you to
a battle.\f
Will you accept the battle
challenge?
DP.563.0024:
For a battle, you need two
Pokémon that are Lv. 30 or below.
DP.563.0026:
[0103,0000] has offered to
make a trade.\f
Will you accept this trade offer?
DP.563.0029:
For trading, you must have at
least two Pokémon with you.
DP.563.0030:
[0103,0000] invites you to mix
records.\f
Would you like to mix records with
the other player?
DP.563.0037:
[011C,0002][0201,000F]\f
This is [0103,0000]! Is there
something that you wanted to do?
DP.563.0038:
Whoops! Sorry, but I have to do
something else.\r
Another time, OK?
DP.563.0039:
Do you want to
do anything else?
DP.563.0040:
... ...
The Trainer appears to be busy...
DP.563.0042:
Sure thing! As my “Greetings,”
here’s my Trainer Case.
DP.563.0043:
Huh? My Trainer Case...
Where’d it go now?\f
Sorry! I’ll show you another time!
DP.563.0044:
I’m just showing my Trainer Case
as my way of a greeting.
DP.563.0045: I hope I get to know you better!
DP.563.0046:
Oh, did you want to draw with me?
Sure thing, but wait just a second.
DP.563.0047:
Thanks for waiting!
Let’s get drawing!
DP.563.0048:
Oh, sorry! I can’t now.
Let’s draw another time.
DP.563.0049:
[0103,0000]: We’re drawing right
now.\f
Oh, I know! [0103,0001], would
you like to draw with us?
DP.563.0050:
Oh, all right.
Come see me anytime, OK?
DP.563.0051:
OK! Let’s do some drawing
together!
DP.563.0053:
The last letter of what you draw has
to be the first letter I draw?
DP.563.0054:
Stop drawing funny faces!
It hurts to laugh so much!
DP.563.0055:
Wow, you’re good!
I’ll try to imitate you!
DP.563.0056:
...Uh-huh... What is that?
That’s supposed to be me?
DP.563.0057:
A battle? Of course, but I need
time to get ready.
DP.563.0058:
Thanks for waiting!
Let’s get our battle started!
DP.563.0059:
Sorry! My Pokémon don’t seem to
be feeling too well right now.\r
Let me battle you another time.
DP.563.0060:
If you want to battle, you need two
Pokémon that are Lv. 30 or lower.\f
DP.563.0061:
Whoa!
I can tell you’re pretty tough!
DP.563.0062:
You used that move?
That’s good strategy!
DP.563.0063:
Way to go!
That was an eye-opener!
DP.563.0064:
Oh! How could you use that
Pokémon in that situation?
DP.563.0065:
You want to trade, huh?
Sure, hold on just a second.
DP.563.0067:
Sorry! I don’t have a Pokémon I
can trade right now.\f
Let’s trade some other time.
DP.563.0068:
Oh yeah!
I really wanted this Pokémon!
DP.563.0069:
Finally, I got that Pokémon
I’ve wanted for such a long time.
DP.563.0070:
You can’t trade if you have only one
Pokémon with you.\f
DP.563.0071:
If you want to do something with
me, just give me a shout!
DP.563.0072:
You want to mix records with me?
OK, I just need a little time.
DP.563.0073:
Thanks for waiting!
Let’s mix our records, then.
DP.563.0074:
Oh, I’m sorry.
I have too much to do right now.\r
Another time, OK?
DP.563.0075:
[0103,0000]: We’re going to mix our
records now.\f
I know! [0103,0001], do you want
to mix your records with us, too?
DP.563.0076:
Oh, all right.
Come see me anytime, OK?
DP.563.0078:
Oh, sorry!
I just can’t right this instant.\r
Another time, OK?
DP.563.0080:
I’m going to mix records with
everyone!
DP.563.0096:
[011C,0002][0201,000F]\f
Hello, it’s [0103,0000]!
Would you like to do something?
DP.563.0097:
Whoops! Sorry, but I have to do
something else.\r
Another time, OK?
DP.563.0099:
... ...
The Trainer appears to be busy...
DP.563.0101:
As my introduction, I’ll show you
my Trainer Case.
DP.563.0102:
Oh? Now where did I put my
Trainer Case...?\f
Sorry! I’ll show you later!
DP.563.0103:
We’re showing each other our
Trainer Cases to get acquainted.
DP.563.0104:
Glad to meet you.
Please don’t be a stranger!
DP.563.0105:
You want to draw with me?
Sure! Just give me a second...
DP.563.0106:
Sorry I made you wait!
Let’s get started!
DP.563.0107:
Oh, I’m sorry!
Let’s draw another time!
DP.563.0108:
[0103,0000]: We were drawing right
now.\f
Oh, I know! [0103,0001], would you
like to draw with us?
DP.563.0110:
OK! Thanks for waiting!
Let’s get drawing!
DP.563.0111:
Sorry!
I just can’t right now!\r
Let’s draw some other time.
DP.563.0114:
I love drawing!
I can draw and draw!
DP.563.0115:
Oops!
I can’t stay inside the lines!
DP.563.0116:
A battle? Of course, but I need
time to get ready.
DP.563.0117:
Sorry I made you wait!
Let’s get started!
DP.563.0118:
I’m terribly sorry, but my Pokémon
aren’t feeling well...\f
Let’s battle another time.
DP.563.0119:
If you want to battle, you need two
Pokémon that are Lv. 30 or lower.\f
DP.563.0120:
That Pokémon...
It’s been raised really well!
DP.563.0121:
That’s it!
This is the right move now!
DP.563.0122:
That’s awesome!
You can battle that way?
DP.563.0123:
You have exquisite timing for
switching Pokémon!
DP.563.0124:
A trade? Of course, but I need
time to get ready.
DP.563.0125:
Sorry I made you wait!
Let’s get started!
DP.563.0126:
I’m sorry, but I don’t have any
Pokémon that I can trade now...\f
Let’s trade some other time!
DP.563.0128:
I finally got that Pokémon I
wanted in a trade!
DP.563.0129:
You can’t trade if you have only
one Pokémon with you.\f
DP.563.0130:
If you want to do something with
me, don’t be shy. Just ask!
DP.563.0131:
You want to mix records?
Sure! But I need a little time!
DP.563.0132:
Sorry I made you wait!
Let’s get started!
DP.563.0133:
Oh, sorry!
Let’s do this another time!
DP.563.0134:
[0103,0000]: We were just mixing
our records.\f
I know! [0103,0001], would you like
to mix your records with us, too?
DP.563.0136:
Thanks for waiting!
Let’s mix some records!
DP.563.0137:
Oh, sorry!
Let’s do this another time!
DP.563.0138: It’s so fun to mix records!
DP.563.0141: I wonder what’s going to happen?
DP.563.0155:
Welcome to the Union Room.\f
If there is anything you need help
with, please let me know!
DP.563.0157:
Which topic would you like me to
explain?
DP.563.0158:
In the Union Room, you may battle
with two Pokémon of your choice\r
that are Lv. 30 or lower.\f
When you visit here, we recommend
that you bring Pokémon that\r
meet this requirement.\f
DP.563.0159:
You may trade your Pokémon with
other players.\f
Meeting new people could be a
shortcut to meeting rare Pokémon!\f
DP.563.0160:
You may communicate with other
players and mix your records.\f
What will happen if you mix records,
you ask?\f
We recommend that you try it and
see!\f
Up to five players can take part,
so try it with your friends!\f
DP.563.0162:
You may get together with others
and draw.\f
You all get to work on one sheet
of paper at the same time.\f
I’m sure a drawing made by friends
will be a memorable masterpiece!\f
Up to five players can take part,
so try it with your friends!\f
DP.563.0163:
You can chat with other people
by selecting “CHAT” in the menu.\f
Go out and meet other players in
the Union Room!\f
Let people know what you’re like
and what you’d like to do.\f
Mingle, chat, and add to your
circle of friends!\f
DP.563.0164:
Oh!
Here comes someone now!\f
Instead of me, why not strike up
a chat with our newcomer?\f
DP.563.0165:
It’s rather boring if no one comes
to visit...\f
What might we do for
entertainment...?\f
DP.563.0166:
Do you sometimes get mistaken for
a real [010E,0000]?\f
I just seem to get that feeling
from you.\f
DP.563.0167:
Hello!\f
That’s right!
It’s important to say a greeting!\f
If someone arrives, let’s try to
be friendly!\f
DP.563.0168:
Greetings!\f
[011C,0000]?
It’s wonderful!\r
I really like it, too!\f
When you meet someone for the first
time, the proper etiquette is to\r
introduce yourself.\f
By introducing yourself, you’ll get to
know about the other person, too!\f
DP.563.0169:
[011C,0000] Trainer?
That’s what you are?\r
Isn’t that something!\f
But I’m sorry to say, I don’t have
any Pokémon...\f
I would rather watch than battle,
you see.\f
DP.563.0170:
Oh! Your [011C,0000]!
I would love to have it!\r
Please trade me!\f
...\f
I was actually joking.\f
I don’t have any Pokémon, so
I can’t trade with anyone...\f
DP.563.0171:
[011C,0000]?
I can understand you’d want one...\f
But you shouldn’t expect people to
make trades just for you.\f
You also have to consider what
Pokémon the other person wants.\f
DP.563.0172:
Welcome to the Union Room!\f
I’m the only one here now, but
please do bring your friends for\r
some fun and excitement!\f
If you have time on your hands,
I’m also here to chat.\f
You see, I have a lot of time on
my hands...\f
DP.563.0173:
I’m quite good at drawing!\f
If it’s [011C,0000],
leave it to me!\r
No one’s better than me at it!\f
DP.563.0174:
Oh, you’re leaving...\f
...\f
It makes me feel lonesome...\f
Please do come visit again!\f
DP.563.0175:
What’s wrong?
Are you feeling down about something?\f
If you’re feeling blue, it’s much
better to have fun with friends\r
than to be alone.\f
DP.563.0176:
[011C,0000]?
Yes, please!\f
...I do want to join in, but I’m
on duty here, so I can’t...\f
Sigh... [011C,0000]...
I wish I could...\f
DP.563.0177:
[011C,0000]?
Me, too, please!\f
But I need to stay here and attend
to our visitors...\f
Please enjoy it with your friends!\f
DP.563.0178:
[011C,0000]?
You’re inviting me?\f
Oh, but I have to stay here and
attend to our visitors.\f
I’m sorry. I’d love to accept,
but I really can’t.\f
DP.563.0179:
That’s right!\f
Sometimes, it might be better to
just go and invite other people.\f
But don’t get too selfish or pushy
because you want to [011C,0000].\f
DP.563.0180:
Yes!
It’s OK!\f
Nothing is impossible.\f
Think positively and keep your
chin up!\f
DP.563.0181:
Everyone has at least one thing
they aren’t good at.\f
You should never try to make someone
do what they don’t want to do.\f
Incidentally, [011C,0000] is
something that I would like to do.\f
DP.563.0182:
Good luck! I hope you enjoy
serious battles.\f
You can’t experience ones like
this in the Union Room!\f
DP.563.0183:
You want to chat?\f
Well, you shouldn’t be wasting your
time chatting with me.\f
You need to be more active and
talk to other players.\f
After all, you can’t make friends
if you don’t talk to people.\f
DP.563.0184:
Where are you?
Um... Right before my eyes.\f
Oh!
Are you maybe an impostor?\f
The real player is somewhere else?\f
...That’s ridiculous!
Please, don’t be silly!\r
My word!\f
DP.563.0185:
[011C,0000] trade?
That sounds fun!\r
I would love to as well.\f
But telling me that won’t help.
I can’t trade with anyone.\f
DP.563.0186:
If you want to have a [011C,0000]
Battle, you need to be more\r
assertive and talk to other players.\f
If you can’t assert yourself, you
may never get a chance at a\r
[011C,0000] Battle!\f
DP.563.0199:
Whoops! Sorry, but I have to do
something else.\r
Another time, OK?
DP.563.0200: Waiting for the other player’s choice.
